title: 10 best herbal tinctures for congestive heart failure
description: Grape tinctures helps with congestive heart failure because it has been shown to improve cardiovascular function by reducing inflammation and oxidative stress in the body. The antioxidants present in grape tincture, such as resveratrol, help to protect the heart from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to the progression of heart disease.
